overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia running along a forest trail at night. The scene features dense woodland with a dirt path illuminated by moonlight, with the character's distinctive white hair and twin swords visible as he moves steadily through the natural environment.

agents.ego_description: Geralt of Rivia jogging steadily along the dirt forest path, twin swords strapped to his back, navigating through the moonlit woodland

entered.detail: Dense tall pine trees lining the left side of the forest path creating a dark woodland border
Dense tall pine trees lining the right side of the forest path creating a dark woodland border
Winding dirt trail through the forest with visible tire tracks and footprints illuminated by moonlight
Tall grass and undergrowth along the right edge of the path swaying slightly in the breeze
Dark teal night sky visible through gaps in the tree canopy with scattered clouds

segments.scene_description: Geralt runs along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night. Tall pine trees flank both sides of the path while moonlight filters through the canopy above, illuminating the grassy verges and scattered rocks along the route. The environment remains consistently dark and atmospheric throughout the continuous forward movement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dense, atmospheric forest under the cover of night. It begins with Geralt running along a narrow dirt trail, where the camera tracks his steady pace through the woodland. As he advances, the view captures tall pine trees flanking both sides of the path, with moonlight filtering through the canopy to highlight the grassy verges. The scene maintains its dark, moody tone as the camera glides past scattered rocks and thick foliage, remaining locked on the trail's progression into the deep forest.
